results.title: Hard Rock International and Mundo Planalto Celebrate Groundbreaking of Hard Rock Hotel Gramado
results.description: New development reinforces Gramado’s position as a premium tourism destination and expands Hard Rock’s presence in Brazil GRAMADO, Brazil, May 21, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Hard Rock International and Mundo Planalto today officially celebrated the groundbreaking of Hard Rock Hotel Gramado, marking a new phase of the construction of the new hospitality development in one of Brazil’s [...] The post Hard Rock International and Mundo Planalto Celebrate Groundbreaking of Hard Rock Hotel Gramado appeared first on Celebrity Hint .
